cross_eval_summary.overall_pattern: with_skill wins on pass_rate (1.0 vs 0.83) and speed (-23.3s) but loses all pairwise comparisons (0% win_rate, avg_margin -0.7125)
cross_eval_summary.core_tension: Skill enforces process compliance over output quality. Judges prefer actionable insights over structural correctness.
mechanism_gaps: Skip mechanism not triggering reliably when user requests direct results
Step 0 info-gathering is too passive—should provide provisional value while collecting context
Output format is too rigid, producing generic decompositions rather than situation-specific insights
cross_eval_summary.stability_concern: weak_stability_value flag present—skill behavior may be inconsistent across runs

repair_recommendations.detail: Ensure '直接要结果', '跳过检查', '不用确认' triggers bypass of Step 1-3 pause markers. Current mechanism_signals show direct_result_mode_detected: false even when user explicitly requests it.

When context is missing, provide a provisional framework or example decomposition alongside questions. This gives immediate value while collecting needed information (as without_skill did successfully in eval 202).

Add explicit instructions to identify the single most critical bottleneck first, then decompose. Require ROI/resource-constraint analysis in application recommendations. Current output is structurally MECE but analytically shallow.

The current output_format template produces generic-looking decompositions. Allow more flexible structure that emphasizes insight over format compliance. Judges consistently prefer substance over structure.
